steps.name: Smarter Balance, Backed by Science
steps.provenance_note: Deterministic flatten of the Claude Design GetFile export (native sha 268abb7a…). Theo's 2026-06-08 receipt pins served sha 2d81b1cd…, differing by the established 46-byte serve/GetFile delta (matches receipt, no drift). Images verified byte-for-byte vs the export asset map; e2-06 capsule-pair render (sha 7e2bb639…) present+inlined at the intro panel; e2-21 lockup (sha 5d86363f) absent; footer STASIS+STIMULANT live pills; composition/flatten/static-survival/live-canvas gates passed 2026-06-08. One canonical CloudFront slice URL remains in a provenance HTML comment (no live hotlink).
